top_signals.title: Chancellor Rachel Reeves statement to Parliament
top_signals.summary: Chancellor Rachel Reeves has today (21 May) updated the House of Commons on the Government's economic response to the war in Iran, and the action they are taking to support families and businesses with the Cost of Living.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Where is Iran’s supreme leader?
top_signals.summary: Months into Mojtaba Khamenei’s absence, officials in the Islamic republic are crafting a narrative that he is well and in charge
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Blockchain.com confidentially submits IPO filing with SEC
top_signals.summary: The crypto services company began the US IPO process as companies across the digital asset sector weigh public market debuts.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: U.N. World Food Program chief thanks Japan amid funding shortfall
top_signals.summary: The organization has seen transportation cost increases affecting things such as food and other relief supplies, since the Strait of Hormuz has effectively been closed.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
